subrequests.text: Add the ability to tag each time entry with a label, and filter the time-entry list by tag, in the existing freelancer time-logging app.
subrequests.reason: 'app you already built' + 'add the ability to ...' + 'Everything else stays as-is' = new behavior into an existing codebase. One atomic feature (tag + filter, same surface, same system), not compound.
